error_signature: Failed to connect to MCP server: SSE error: Failed to fetch
title: Connection issue with MCP tool and VAPI AI
symptom: When attempting to connect the MCP tool with VAPI AI, a 500 HTTP error occurs with a message indicating a failure to connect to the MCP server.
applies_when: Using MCP tool with VAPI AI
n8n is not updated to the latest version
not_this_if: n8n is already updated to the latest version
root_cause: The error occurs due to outdated n8n versions or incorrect webhook configurations. The connection to the MCP server fails when the webhook settings do not match the expected format or when the n8n instance is not up to date.
fix_steps: Update n8n to the latest stable version.
Configure the webhook settings to use a POST request and respond to the webhook.
Ensure the JSON format in the respond to webhook node matches the VAPI AI documentation.
Copy the production link and paste it into the VAPI AI MCP tool.
Choose the connection type to SSL and set the timer to 30 seconds.
Complete the rest of the tool configurations.
agent_instruction: Update n8n and configure the webhook settings as per the VAPI AI documentation.
